## What this PR does

One-line summary, then a slightly longer paragraph if needed.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link related issues with `Fixes #N` or `Refs #N`.

## Type of change

- [ ] Rule change update (Hattrick mechanic changed)
- [ ] New content (topic that wasn't covered before)
- [ ] Correction (existing content was wrong, outdated, or unclear)
- [ ] Language pack (new or updated)
- [ ] Infrastructure (README, CONTRIBUTING, templates, plugin manifest)
- [ ] Other:

## Sources

Citations for any factual additions. Devblog post, forum thread, wiki page, community study. Required for non-obvious facts.

## Checklist

- [ ] Content is written in my own words (no verbatim text from Hattrick.org or the rulebook, per CHPP rule 7.2)
- [ ] Non-obvious facts are sourced
- [ ] Tone matches existing content (dense, factual, no filler)
- [ ] If adding a new section or reference file, I've added a cross-reference from `SKILL.md`
- [ ] If touching a rule that's mentioned in multiple places, I've updated all of them
- [ ] For language packs: file is at `skills/hattrick/references/languages/<language>.md` and follows the structure of `hungarian.md`
